questions: What is the stage of the carcinoma breast?
What is the tumor size in cm?
Does the tumor involve the nipple-areola complex? (Yes/No)
Is the diagnosis Ductal Carcinoma In Situ (DCIS)? (Yes/No)
Is the stage IIIB (locally advanced breast cancer)? (Yes/No)
Are there adverse prognostic factors present (lymphovascular invasion, high nuclear grade, high histological grade, HER 2/neu overexpression, negative hormone receptor status)? (Yes/No)
